extortion.description: Bethany Hospital has put together surgical and clinical expertise of  very high quality. This 190-bed, centrally air-conditioned hospital is  fully equipped for world-class patient-centred medical and surgical  services. It houses a state-of-the-art 24-hour trauma center with an  operation theatre attached. Out-patient rooms and the latest diagnostic  equipment including the cutting-edge Siemens 1.5 Tesla MRI Scanner,  Multi-slice spiral CT-Scan, a 15-bed ICU, 16-bed ICCU, 12-bed NICU,  delivery suite, dialysis room and state-of-the-art pathology and four  modular Operation Theatres, along with a host of well-appointed wards  are on par with Mumbai city’s finest.Content: valuable and sensitive information, from organizational and technical to personal information (databases, reports, employees, patients, etc.)*for review purposes, you can download just a few files for free to get an idea of what is contained in the entire folder before purchasing. https://bethanyhospital.in
